svg.title: Financial Ad Review AI - GraphRAG Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing how GraphRAG powers a financial advertising compliance review system, from knowledge graph construction to ad review output.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What regulatory documents should I include for financial ad compliance in China/Japan?')
sendPrompt('What ontology should I design for financial advertising concepts?')
sendPrompt('What historical violation cases help train a financial ad review system?')
sendPrompt('What is GraphDB and how do I use it to store a compliance knowledge graph?')

g.text: Rules · Prohibited terms · Disclosure requirements · Violation patterns · Product categories · Regulatory relationships
PoolParty taxonomies + GraphDB triplestore + semantic inference

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do I extract entities and claims from financial ad text for compliance checking?')
sendPrompt('How does graph retrieval work in GraphRAG for compliance checking?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM use retrieved graph context to judge ad compliance?')
sendPrompt('What should the output of a financial ad compliance review system include?')

g.text: Violation details · Cited regulation article · Suggested revision · Explainable reasoning chain
Full traceability — every decision links back to a graph node
